UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OKWECHIME, KASOUNDRIE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OKWECHIME, KASOUNDRIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 980 HOWARD ST., #201, CCSF, PLTF JOHN STEWART CO IS AWARDED JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT KASOUNDRIE OKWECHIME FOR RESTITUTION OF POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 980 HOWARD ST, #201, IN CITY & COUNTY OF SF, CA., FORFEITURE OF THE RENTAL AGREEEMNT, BACK RENT & DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $0. WITH EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES & COSTS.
